name: fleet-refresh-0-19-3
title: Roll out sd-ai-command-pack 0.19.9 to the fleet
description: Refresh every stale registered consumer to the corrected pack release 0.19.9 after integration review stopped earlier rollout candidates.
creator: sdelmas
notes: The rollout began at 0.19.3. Loadsmith PR #90 surfaced a pack-owned file-path resolution defect, and source PRs #154/#155 produced tagged release 0.19.8 after guard and review hardening. Coordinator PR #118 then exposed a second pack-owned sd-status defect: reviewCount used one paginated REST page. The rollout is paused again while 0.19.9 replaces that with a bounded GraphQL total and is validated, merged, and tagged.
